Design_Description: 2D spatial heatmap classification head for pelvis UV; soft Gaussian target (sigma=2 cells); KL heatmap loss weight 0.5; no learnable temperature.
2D spatial heatmap classification head for pelvis UV; tight Gaussian target (sigma=1 cell); KL heatmap loss weight 1.0; no learnable temperature.
